title: Biomedical Knowledge Graphs and RNA-KG
author: Cavalleri, Emanuele
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The slides in this repository  were developed for Prof. Giorgio Valentini, AnacletoLab, University of Milan, course titled "Bioinformatics" (MSc Computer Science).  The slides are focused on the representation, construction, and technical validation of knowledge graphs within the biomedical domain. They also describe a practical example of biomedical KG construction ( RNA-KG ).
